author: tersec
content:
Looking at https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/releases/tag/v1.7.0-alpha.3 and there's an oddity in the test vectors:
```
$ ls tests/minimal/gloas/operations/voluntary_exit/pyspec_tests/builder_voluntary_exit__success/
manifest.yaml  post.ssz_snappy  pre.ssz_snappy
$ ls tests/mainnet/gloas/operations/voluntary_exit/pyspec_tests/builder_voluntary_exit__success/
manifest.yaml  post.ssz_snappy  pre.ssz_snappy
```
Every other Gloas voluntary exit test has a `voluntary_exit.ssz_snappy`. Is this intentional?

author: nflaig
content: that's a bug in the spec test, see https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5005, should be fixed in the next release
